languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear here, Jae! Suffering is the lot of all who wish to preserve the purity of their souls in His gaze."

languages.text: "Здесь нечего страшиться, Джай! Страдания есть удел всех, кто хочет сохранить свою душу чистой перед Его взором".
"There is nothing to fear here, Jae! Suffering is the lot of all who wish to preserve the purity of their souls in His gaze."

"There is nothing to fear here, Jae! Suffering is the lot of all who wish to preserve the purity of their souls in His gaze."

languages.text: 「ここには恐れるべきものはない、ジェイ。神様の眼差しの中で魂の純粋さを守ろうとする者は皆、苦しみを受ける運命にあるのだ」
languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear here, Jae! Suffering is the lot of all who wish to preserve the purity of their souls in His gaze."

traits.locale_text: 「ここには恐れるべきものはない、ジェ。神様の眼差しの中で魂の純粋さを守ろうとする者は皆、苦しみを受ける運命にあるのだ。」

languages.text: « Il n'y a rien à craindre ici, Jae ! La souffrance est le lot de tous ceux qui souhaitent préserver la pureté de leur âme aux yeux de l'Empereur. »
languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear here, Jae! Suffering is the lot of all who wish to preserve the purity of their souls in His gaze."

traits.locale_text: « Il n'y a rien à craindre ici, Jae ! La souffrance est le lot de tous ceux qui souhaitent préserver la pureté de leur âme aux yeux de l'Empereur. »

languages.text: "Hier gibt es nichts, was Ihr fürchten müsst, Jae. Wer die Reinheit seiner Seele in Seinen Augen bewahren möchte, ist zum Leiden bestimmt."
languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear here, Jae! Suffering is the lot of all who wish to preserve the purity of their souls in His gaze."

traits.locale_text: "Hier gibt es nichts, was Ihr fürchten müsst, Jae. Wer die Reinheit seiner Seele in Seinen Augen bewahren möchte, ist zum Leiden bestimmt."

languages.text: "Burada korkulacak bir şey yok Jae! Acı, O'nun bakışları altında ruhlarının saflığını korumak isteyen herkesin kaderidir."
languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear here, Jae! Suffering is the lot of all who wish to preserve the purity of their souls in His gaze."

traits.locale_text: "Burada korkulacak bir şey yok Jae! Acı, O'nun bakışları altında ruhlarının saflığını korumak isteyen herkesin kaderidir."

languages.text: «¡Aquí no hay nada que temer, Jae! El sufrimiento es el sino de quienes desean preservar la pureza de sus almas ante Su mirada».
languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear here, Jae! Suffering is the lot of all who wish to preserve the purity of their souls in His gaze."

traits.locale_text: «¡Aquí no hay nada que temer, Jae! El sufrimiento es el sino de quienes desean preservar la pureza de sus almas ante Su mirada».

languages.text: “这里没什么可怕的，婕伊！所有希望在祂的注视下保持灵魂纯洁的人，都必须经受苦难的洗礼。”
languages.original_text: "There is nothing to fear here, Jae! Suffering is the lot of all who wish to preserve the purity of their souls in His gaze."

traits.locale_text: “这里没什么可怕的，婕伊！所有希望在祂的注视下保持灵魂纯洁的人，都必须经受苦难的洗礼。”
